content:
# Session 19 (iter-019) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- Sorry count (TensorObjSubstrate.lean): **2 → 1**. Project-wide bare `sorry`: **1** (only `exists_tensorObj_inverse`, L708, import-cycle deferred).
- File GREEN: `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjSubstrate` → 8321 jobs, exit 0, sole `sorry` warning = L708. Verified ground-truth this review.
- Target attempted: `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`, Sq4 leaf brick).
- One opus prover lane. 42 edits, 0 in-lane build errors at end.

## Headline result — D3′ cone CLOSED
`pullbackValIso_comp_leg` — the 5-iteration-stuck leaf brick (the LAST active sorry of the entire D3′
comparison-iso cone) — is **CLOSED, axiom-clean**. `#print axioms` →
`[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (no `sorryAx`; confirmed by review `lean_verify`). The whole
D3′ cone (`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` = `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange`) is now sorry-free
(also re-confirmed axiom-clean by aud019). The only remaining `.lean` sorry is the architecturally
deferred import-cycle terminal `exists_tensorObj_inverse`.

## How it was solved (the unblock)
Prior 5 iters died on instance-boundary `erw`/`Category.assoc`/`reassoc_of%`/`simp` whnf-bombs on the
`SheafOfModules Z` carrier (the `Sheaf.val`↔`ObjectProperty.obj` deprecated-alias = defeq-but-not-
syntactic boundary — even plain `Category.assoc` fails there).

**Key insight:** applying **unit naturality** of `η^Z` to both legs factors out a common leading
`η^Z ≫ forget(·)`, collapsing the goal cocycle (G) to a clean **sheaf-level cocycle `hH`** (no units,
no forget). `hH` is then chased to a common middle via Sq4a (inverse of `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`)
+ `pullbackComp` naturality at the counit (LHS) and `(sheafificationCompPullback h).inv` naturality + the
(T) adjunction triangle (RHS).

**Lean realisation:** the carrier algebra runs through **generic single-`[Category C]` lemmas applied by
`exact`** (the documented instance-crossing device family) — `rw`/`simp`/`erw` cannot key-match the carrier.
5 new sorry-free `private` helpers landed, each non-vacuous + used exactly once (aud019-confirmed):
- `comp_forget_cocycle` — forget-image of a sheaf-cocycle prefixed by `η` reassembles ((H)→(G) bridge). Applied by `exact` after `slice_lhs/slice_rhs` fold the units. NB `forget` must be passed explicitly (else "typeclass instance problem is stuck").
- `inv_telescope` — generic interleaved 3-pair iso telescope (collapses the Sq4a inverse).
- `cocycle_assemble` — generic cocycle algebra skeleton of `hH`.
- `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv` — project-specific Sq4a (inverse of Sq1 `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`); proved by `Iso.comp_inv_eq` + `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` + `inv_telescope`.
- `adj_unit_map_counit` — generic adjunction triangle `L.map(η ≫ R k) ≫ ε = k`, proved cleanly as `(adj.homEquiv P M).left_inv k` (the (T) step `h4`; needed `maxHeartbeats 1600000`).

## Attempt-level dead-ends (do NOT retry on carrier)
- `rw [reassoc_of% hUZ1]` / `erw [reassoc_of% …]` / chained `rw [← Category.assoc, …]` for the unit fold → "pattern not found" (trailing-metavar / cross-eqn `← Category.assoc` ambiguity, then whnf). **WORKS:** `slice_lhs`/`slice_rhs` to fold, then `exact comp_forget_cocycle …`.
- `rw [← Functor.map_comp]` to merge `forget.map _ ≫ forget.map _` → fails (deprecated-alias defeq boundary). **WORKS:** generic `comp_forget_cocycle` by `exact`.
- `simp` / `simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.…]` to telescope Sq4a inverse → "no progress". **WORKS:** generic `inv_telescope` by `exact`.
- `rw [adj.counit_naturality, adj.left_triangle_components_assoc]` and `rw [← adj.homEquiv_unit, ← adj.homEquiv_counit, Equiv.symm_apply_apply]` for the triangle → unsolved / pattern-not-found. **WORKS:** term-mode `(adj.homEquiv P M).left_inv k`.
- `rw`-resolving `Functor.map_id` picked the **Haskell `Functor`** (name clash) → use `CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id`.
- Stating `pVI` unfolds as separate `have`s leaves a defeq-but-not-syntactic `X = X` `simp` won't close → `set b := …` (opaque local) then `simp only [pullbackValIso, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom]` unfolds only the targeted legs.

## Review audits dispatched
- **lean-auditor (aud019)** — PASS, 0 critical / 3 major / 2 minor. `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` AND `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` both axiom-clean (`propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound`); 5 helpers non-vacuous + each used once; sole sorry = L708 confirmed. 3 MAJOR = stale `.lean` comments (header L64–66 still calls `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` the "SOLE remaining sorry", contradicting the L45–47 update; L3493–94 + L3555–56 say "Typed sorry retained" for a sorry that no longer exists). Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-aud019.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint (tos019)** — PASS, 0 must-fix / 1 major / 1 minor. Signature term-for-term matches `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`; proof realises the def-expand→scpb→counit→interleave argument; new scpb pin correct. MAJOR (blueprint-only, non-blocking) = my first counit NOTE mis-named the Sq4b realiser → **fixed this review** (Sq4b = `h2` = `pullbackComp h f` naturality at counit, not the (T) triangle `adj_unit_map_counit`). Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tos019.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_scpb`: added `\lean{AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv}` (prover realised this as a standalone project-specific lemma) + replaced the stale "no \lean pin" NOTE.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_scpb`: added `\leanok` (**manual override** — `sync_leanok` ran at sha 023f2ca BEFORE this pin existed, so it could not have seen it; the decl is sorry-free + axiom-clean — `lean_verify` → no `sorryAx` — so the marker is correct; next sync will re-confirm).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_counit`: rewrote the NOTE to record the iter-019 in-proof closure and the corrected Sq4b realiser (`h2`); still no standalone `\lean{}` pin (intentional — realised in-proof).

(Deterministic `sync_leanok` iter-019 sha 023f2ca added +2/−0 on this chapter — the statement + proof `\leanok` for `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp` now that the body is sorry-free. Not laundering: aud019 confirms axiom-clean.)

## Markers / doctor / dag
- blueprint-doctor: **clean** (no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no axioms).
- dag unmatched = **105** (+5 this iter = the 5 new private helpers; standing bulk debt otherwise). `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv` is now pinned (will drop from unmatched next graph build); the other 4 listed in recommendations for the planner to blueprint-or-exempt.

## Notes (LOW)
- `lean_verify` source-scan flagged `opaque` at L511, L2201, L3421 — pre-existing keyword hits, not laundering (aud019 raised no laundering concern).

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: D3′ is done; next prover should advance the **downstream consumers**
(`pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial`, `pullback_tensorObj_iso`, `PicSharp.addCommGroup_via_tensorObj`,
and ultimately `exists_tensorObj_inverse` via the dual chain). Planner must register the 4 generic helpers
and prune 3 stale `.lean` comments (next prover, since review cannot edit `.lean`).
